description_long: This object is a humanoid doll with a fragmented and abstract appearance, featuring elongated limbs and a partially deconstructed torso. The surface is predominantly a pale, flesh-toned color with some darker brown and pinkish hues, giving the impression of synthetic skin or painted plastic. The doll's head and hair are rendered in a chaotic, almost shredded style, with strands and pieces extending outward. One leg is extended backward while the other is bent, and the arms are positioned asymmetrically, contributing to a dynamic, almost mid-motion pose. The overall form is incomplete, with several gaps and missing sections, especially in the torso and head, suggesting either artistic stylization or damage. The object appears lightweight and hollow, likely made from plastic or resin, and is not designed to support weight or contain other objects.
description: A fragmented, humanoid doll with elongated limbs, pale skin tones, and a chaotic, shredded hair style. The doll is posed dynamically with missing sections and an abstract, incomplete form.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, shredded hair, and extended limbs, with the torso and head appearing most fragmented.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated leg and arm, with the doll's profile and gaps in the torso more visible.
description_view_2: Close-up of the upper body and head, emphasizing the chaotic hair and missing facial features.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the legs and the abstract, incomplete structure of the doll's body.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll appears unclothed, with no visible garments, patterns, or fashion accessories present.
attribute_pose: The doll is posed with one leg extended backward and the other bent, one arm reaching outward and the other hanging down, and the torso twisted, suggesting a dynamic, mid-motion stance.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial features are mostly missing or abstracted, with no discernible expression due to the fragmented head and face.
attribute_hair_style: The hair is rendered as a chaotic, shredded mass of medium-length strands, primarily brown in color, with an unkempt and wild appearance.
